auto_dnd.description: Enable notification Do Not Disturb while sharing. Only turns DND off afterwards if this plugin enabled it.
auto_dnd.label: Auto Do Not Disturb

glyph.description: Glyph shown while a share session is active.
glyph.label: Glyph

poll_ms.description: How often the service polls pw-dump (milliseconds).
poll_ms.label: Poll interval (ms)
